# אומץ לב — Ometz Lev

> אילוף כלבים מקצועי וכלבנות טיפולית | Professional Dog Training & Therapeutic Dog Work in Israel

## About

אומץ לב is an Israeli dog training and animal-assisted therapy business founded and operated by אלעד שמעונוב (Elad Shimunov), based in ראשון לציון (Rishon LeZion). Services are provided across the central Israel region (Gush Dan).

Elad has over 9 years of professional experience in dog training and animal-assisted therapy. He specializes in Force Free positive-reinforcement methods for dog training, and therapeutic canine work for emotional and behavioral challenges in children, youth, and adults.

Contact: 052-472-4700 | Eladshi1326@gmail.com

## Services

### Dog Training — אילוף כלבים
Professional in-home dog training using positive reinforcement methods. Covers obedience training, behavior problem solving (aggression, anxiety, pulling, jumping), puppy training, and long-term follow-up.
Full details: https://ometzlev.co.il/training

### Therapeutic Dog Work — כלבנות טיפולית
Animal-assisted therapy using trained therapeutic dogs to help individuals overcome fears, anxiety, depression, and emotional challenges. Individual programs for children, youth, and adults.
Full details: https://ometzlev.co.il/therapy

### Activities — פעילויות
Summer camps for children with dogs, weekly enrichment clubs, and social skill development activities.
Full details: https://ometzlev.co.il/activities

### Educational School Programs — יוזמות חינוכיות לבתי ספר
Educational programs in schools combining dog interaction to develop empathy, responsibility, and social skills. Operating since 2022 in the Central District and Tel Aviv District. Suitable for grades 1–6, both public and religious-public schools.
Full details: https://ometzlev.co.il/schools

## Content Library

- Training videos: https://ometzlev.co.il/training-videos-library
- Training articles: https://ometzlev.co.il/training-articles-library
- Therapy videos: https://ometzlev.co.il/therapy-videos-library
- Therapy articles: https://ometzlev.co.il/therapy-articles-library

## Location & Service Area

Based in ראשון לציון (Rishon LeZion), Israel.
Serves: תל אביב (Tel Aviv), חולון (Holon), בת ים (Bat Yam), הרצליה (Herzliya), רמת גן (Ramat Gan), פתח תקווה (Petah Tikva), and surrounding Gush Dan / Central Israel areas.
